creation_errors.journey_stages:
(psycopg2.errors.DuplicateTable) relation "journey_stages" already exists

[SQL: 
CREATE TABLE journey_stages (
	journey_id UUID DEFAULT gen_random_uuid() NOT NULL, 
	user_id UUID, 
	current_stage VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, 
	stage_started_at TIMESTAMP WITHOUT TIME ZONE DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL, 
	previous_stage VARCHAR(50), 
	velocity_score NUMERIC(3, 2), 
	updated_at TIMESTAMP WITHOUT TIME ZONE DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 
	PRIMARY KEY (journey_id), 
	UNIQUE (user_id), 
	FOREIGN KEY(user_id) REFERENCES users (user_id) ON DELETE CASCADE
)

]

[SQL: 
CREATE TABLE milestones (
	milestone_id UUID DEFAULT gen_random_uuid() NOT NULL, 
	user_id UUID, 
	milestone_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, 
	journey_stage VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, 
	completed BOOLEAN, 
	completed_at TIMESTAMP WITHOUT TIME ZONE, 
	reward_points INTEGER, 
	created_at TIMESTAMP WITHOUT TIME ZONE DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 
	PRIMARY KEY (milestone_id), 
	CONSTRAINT uq_user_milestone UNIQUE (user_id, milestone_name), 
	FOREIGN KEY(user_id) REFERENCES users (user_id) ON DELETE CASCADE
